summary: Recent updates to the Web Speech feature in Firefox enhance its integration and logging capabilities. One significant change is the new connection of Web Speech to the media-control infrastructure, allowing it to function as an uncontrollable receiver. This integration means that voice commands can better interact with media playback functionality. Additionally, the use of **MOZ_LOG_FMT** for improved logging will help developers troubleshoot and optimize the Web Speech functionality more effectively, which can lead to a smoother user experience in voice applications.
